text: ' dbry qhlt bn dvd mlkh byrvshlm
b hbl hblym 'mr qhlt hbl hblym hkhl hbl
g mh ytrvn l'dm bkhl 'mlv--shy'ml tcht hshmsh
d dvr hlkh vdvr b' vh'rts l'vlm 'mdt
h vzrch hshmsh vb' hshmsh v'l mqvmv--shv'f zvrch hv' shm
v hvlkh 'l drvm vsvbb 'l tsfvn svbb sbb hvlkh hrvch v'l sbybtyv shb hrvch
z khl hnchlym hlkhym 'l hym vhym 'ynnv ml' 'l mqvm shhnchlym hlkhym--shm hm shbym llkht
ch khl hdbrym yg'ym l' yvkhl 'ysh ldbr l' tshb' 'yn lr'vt vl' tml' 'zn mshm'
t mh shhyh hv' shyhyh vmh shn'shh hv' shy'shh v'yn khl chdsh tcht hshmsh
y ysh dbr shy'mr r'h zh chdsh hv' khbr hyh l'lmym 'shr hyh mlfnnv
y' 'yn zkhrvn lr'shnym vgm l'chrnym shyhyv l' yhyh lhm zkhrvn--'m shyhyv l'chrnh {f}
yb 'ny qhlt hyyty mlkh 'l yshr'l--byrvshlm
yg vntty 't lby ldrvsh vltvr bchkhmh 'l khl 'shr n'shh tcht hshmym hv' 'nyn r' ntn 'lhym lbny h'dm--l'nvt bv
yd r'yty 't khl hm'shym shn'shv tcht hshmsh vhnh hkhl hbl vr'vt rvch
tv m'vt l' yvkhl ltqn vchsrvn l' yvkhl lhmnvt
tz dbrty 'ny 'm lby l'mr--'ny hnh hgdlty vhvsfty chkhmh 'l khl 'shr hyh lfny 'l yrvshlm vlby r'h hrbh chkhmh vd't
yz v'tnh lby ld't chkhmh vd't hvllt vshkhlvt yd'ty shgm zh hv' r'yvn rvch
ych khy brb chkhmh rb kh's vyvsyf d't yvsyf mkh'vb
' 'mrty 'ny blby lkhh n' 'nskhh bshmchh vr'h btvb vhnh gm hv' hbl
b lshchvq 'mrty mhvll vlshmchh mh zh 'shh
g trty blby lmshvkh byyn 't bshry vlby nhg bchkhmh vl'chz bskhlvt--'d 'shr 'r'h 'y zh tvb lbny h'dm 'shr y'shv tcht hshmym msfr ymy chyyhm
d hgdlty m'shy bnyty ly btym nt'ty ly khrmym
h 'shyty ly gnvt vfrdsym vnt'ty bhm 'ts khl fry
v 'shyty ly brkhvt mym--lhshqvt mhm y'r tsvmch 'tsym
z qnyty 'bdym vshfchvt vbny byt hyh ly gm mqnh bqr vts'n hrbh hyh ly mkhl shhyv lfny byrvshlm
ch khnsty ly gm khsf vzhb vsglt mlkhym vhmdynvt 'shyty ly shrym vshrvt vt'ngvt bny h'dm--shdh vshdvt
t vgdlty vhvsfty mkhl shhyh lfny byrvshlm 'f chkhmty 'mdh ly
y vkhl 'shr sh'lv 'yny l' 'tslty mhm l' mn'ty 't lby mkhl shmchh khy lby shmch mkhl 'mly vzh hyh chlqy mkhl 'mly
y' vfnyty 'ny bkhl m'shy sh'shv ydy vb'ml sh'mlty l'shvt vhnh hkhl hbl vr'vt rvch v'yn ytrvn tcht hshmsh
yb vfnyty 'ny lr'vt chkhmh vhvllvt vskhlvt khy mh h'dm shybv' 'chry hmlkh 't 'shr khbr 'shvhv
yg vr'yty 'ny shysh ytrvn lchkhmh mn hskhlvt--khytrvn h'vr mn hchshkh
yd hchkhm 'ynyv br'shv vhkhsyl bchshkh hvlkh vyd'ty gm 'ny shmqrh 'chd yqrh 't khlm
tv v'mrty 'ny blby khmqrh hkhsyl gm 'ny yqrny vlmh chkhmty 'ny 'z ytr vdbrty blby shgm zh hbl
tz khy 'yn zkhrvn lchkhm 'm hkhsyl l'vlm bshkhbr hymym hb'ym hkhl nshkhch v'ykh ymvt hchkhm 'm hkhsyl
yz vshn'ty 't hchyym--khy r' 'ly hm'shh shn'shh tcht hshmsh khy hkhl hbl vr'vt rvch
ych vshn'ty 'ny 't khl 'mly sh'ny 'ml tcht hshmsh sh'nychnv l'dm shyhyh 'chry
yt vmy yvd' hchkhm yhyh 'v skhl vyshlt bkhl 'mly sh'mlty vshchkhmty tcht hshmsh gm zh hbl
kh vsbvty 'ny ly'sh 't lby--'l khl h'ml sh'mlty tcht hshmsh
kh' khy ysh 'dm sh'mlv bchkhmh vbd't--vbkhshrvn vl'dm shl' 'ml bv ytnnv chlqv--gm zh hbl vr'h rbh
khb khy mh hvh l'dm bkhl 'mlv vbr'yvn lbv--shhv' 'ml tcht hshmsh
khg khy khl ymyv mkh'bym vkh's 'nynv--gm blylh l' shkhb lbv gm zh hbl hv'
khd 'yn tvb b'dm shy'khl vshth vhr'h 't nfshv tvb b'mlv gm zh r'yty 'ny khy myd h'lhym hy'
khh khy my y'khl vmy ychvsh chvts mmny
khv khy l'dm shtvb lfnyv ntn chkhmh vd't vshmchh vlchvt' ntn 'nyn l'sf vlkhnvs ltt ltvb lfny h'lhym--gm zh hbl vr'vt rvch
' lkhl zmn v't lkhl chfts tcht hshmym {f}
b   't lldt    v't lmvt      't lt't    v't l'qvr ntv'
g   't lhrvg    v't lrfv'      't lfrvts    v't lbnvt
d   't lbkhvt     v't lshchvq      't sfvd     v't rqvd
h   't lhshlykh 'bnym    v't khnvs 'bnym      't lchbvq     v't lrchq mchbq
v   't lbqsh     v't l'bd      't lshmvr    v't lhshlykh
z   't lqrv'    v't ltfvr      't lchshvt    v't ldbr
ch   't l'hb     v't lshn'      't mlchmh    v't shlvm {f}
t     mh ytrvn h'vshh b'shr hv' 'ml
y r'yty 't h'nyn 'shr ntn 'lhym lbny h'dm--l'nvt bv
y' 't hkhl 'shh yfh b'tv gm 't h'lm ntn blbm--mbly 'shr l' ymts' h'dm 't hm'shh 'shr 'shh h'lhym mr'sh v'd svf
yb yd'ty khy 'yn tvb bm--khy 'm lshmvch vl'shvt tvb bchyyv
yg vgm khl h'dm shy'khl vshth vr'h tvb bkhl 'mlv--mtt 'lhym hy'
yd yd'ty khy khl 'shr y'shh h'lhym hv' yhyh l'vlm--'lyv 'yn lhvsyf vmmnv 'yn lgr' vh'lhym 'shh shyr'v mlfnyv
tv mh shhyh khbr hv' v'shr lhyvt khbr hyh vh'lhym ybqsh 't nrdf
tz v'vd r'yty tcht hshmsh mqvm hmshft shmh hrsh' vmqvm htsdq shmh hrsh'
yz 'mrty 'ny blby--'t htsdyq v't hrsh' yshft h'lhym khy 't lkhl chfts v'l khl hm'shh shm
ych 'mrty 'ny blby--'l dbrt bny h'dm lbrm h'lhym vlr'vt shhm bhmh hmh lhm
yt khy mqrh bny h'dm vmqrh hbhmh vmqrh 'chd lhm--khmvt zh khn mvt zh vrvch 'chd lkhl vmvtr h'dm mn hbhmh 'yn khy hkhl hbl
kh hkhl hvlkh 'l mqvm 'chd hkhl hyh mn h'fr vhkhl shb 'l h'fr
kh' my yvd' rvch bny h'dm--h'lh hy' lm'lh vrvch hbhmh--hyrdt hy' lmth l'rts
khb vr'yty khy 'yn tvb m'shr yshmch h'dm bm'shyv--khy hv' chlqv khy my yby'nv lr'vt bmh shyhyh 'chryv
' vshbty 'ny v'r'h 't khl h'shqym 'shr n'shym tcht hshmsh vhnh dm't h'shqym v'yn lhm mnchm vmyd 'shqyhm khch v'yn lhm mnchm
b vshbch 'ny 't hmtym shkhbr mtv--mn hchyym 'shr hmh chyym 'dnh
g vtvb mshnyhm--'t 'shr 'dn l' hyh 'shr l' r'h 't hm'shh hr' 'shr n'shh tcht hshmsh
d vr'yty 'ny 't khl 'ml v't khl khshrvn hm'shh--khy hy' qn't 'ysh mr'hv gm zh hbl vr'vt rvch
h hkhsyl chbq 't ydyv v'khl 't bshrv
v tvb ml' khf ncht--mml' chfnym 'ml vr'vt rvch
z vshbty 'ny v'r'h hbl tcht hshmsh
ch ysh 'chd v'yn shny gm bn v'ch 'yn lv v'yn qts lkhl 'mlv--gm 'ynyv ('ynv) l' tshb' 'shr vlmy 'ny 'ml vmchsr 't nfshy mtvbh--gm zh hbl v'nyn r' hv'
t tvbym hshnym mn h'chd 'shr ysh lhm shkhr tvb b'mlm
y khy 'm yflv h'chd yqym 't chbrv v'ylv h'chd shyfvl v'yn shny lhqymv
y' gm 'm yshkhbv shnym vchm lhm vl'chd 'ykh ychm
yb v'm ytqfv h'chd--hshnym y'mdv ngdv vhchvt hmshlsh l' bmhrh yntq
yg tvb yld mskhn vchkhm--mmlkh zqn vkhsyl 'shr l' yd' lhzhr 'vd
yd khy mbyt hsvrym yts' lmlkh khy gm bmlkhvtv nvld rsh
tv r'yty 't khl hchyym hmhlkhym tcht hshmsh--'m hyld hshny 'shr y'md tchtyv

tz 'yn qts lkhl h'm lkhl 'shr hyh lfnyhm--gm h'chrvnym l' yshmchv bv khy gm zh hbl vr'yvn rvch [ (Ecclesiastes 4:17) yz shmr rglykh (rglkh) kh'shr tlkh 'l byt h'lhym vqrvb lshm' mtt hkhsylym zbch khy 'ynm yvd'ym l'shvt r' ]
' 'l tbhl 'l fykh vlbkh 'l ymhr lhvtsy' dbr--lfny h'lhym khy h'lhym bshmym v'th 'l h'rts 'l khn yhyv dbrykh m'tym
b khy b' hchlvm brb 'nyn vqvl khsyl brb dbrym
g kh'shr tdr ndr l'lhym 'l t'chr lshlmv--khy 'yn chfts bkhsylym 't 'shr tdr shlm
d tvb 'shr l' tdr--mshtdvr vl' tshlm
h 'l ttn 't fykh lchty' 't bshrkh v'l t'mr lfny hml'kh khy shggh hy' lmh yqtsf h'lhym 'l qvlkh vchbl 't m'shh ydykh
v khy brb chlmvt vhblym vdbrym hrbh khy 't h'lhym yr'
z 'm 'shq rsh vgzl mshft vtsdq tr'h bmdynh--'l ttmh 'l hchfts khy gbh m'l gbh shmr vgbhym 'lyhm
ch vytrvn 'rts bkhl hy' (hv')--mlkh lshdh n'bd
t 'hb khsf l' yshb' khsf vmy 'hb bhmvn l' tbv'h gm zh hbl
y brbvt htvbh rbv 'vkhlyh vmh khshrvn lb'lyh khy 'm r'yt (r'vt) 'ynyv
y' mtvqh shnt h'bd 'm m't v'm hrbh y'khl vhshb' l'shyr--'ynnv mnych lv lyshvn
yb ysh r'h chvlh r'yty tcht hshmsh 'shr shmvr lb'lyv lr'tv
yg v'bd h'shr hhv' b'nyn r' vhvlyd bn v'yn bydv m'vmh
yd kh'shr yts' mbtn 'mv 'rvm yshvb llkht khshb' vm'vmh l' ysh' b'mlv shylkh bydv
tv vgm zh r'h chvlh khl 'mt shb' khn ylkh vmh ytrvn lv shy'ml lrvch
tz gm khl ymyv bchshkh y'khl vkh's hrbh vchlyv vqtsf
yz hnh 'shr r'yty 'ny tvb 'shr yfh l'khvl vlshtvt vlr'vt tvbh bkhl 'mlv shy'ml tcht hshmsh msfr ymy chyv 'shr ntn lv h'lhym--khy hv' chlqv
ych gm khl h'dm 'shr ntn lv h'lhym 'shr vnkhsym vhshlytv l'khl mmnv vlsh't 't chlqv vlshmch b'mlv--zh mtt 'lhym hy'
yt khy l' hrbh yzkhr 't ymy chyyv khy h'lhym m'nh bshmcht lbv
' ysh r'h 'shr r'yty tcht hshmsh vrbh hy' 'l h'dm
b 'ysh 'shr ytn lv h'lhym 'shr vnkhsym vkhbvd v'ynnv chsr lnfshv mkhl 'shr yt'vh vl' yshlytnv h'lhym l'khl mmnv--khy 'ysh nkhry y'khlnv zh hbl vchly r' hv'
g 'm yvlyd 'ysh m'h vshnym rbvt ychyh vrb shyhyv ymy shnyv vnfshv l' tshb' mn htvbh vgm qbvrh l' hyth lv--'mrty tvb mmnv hnfl
d khy bhbl b' vbchshkh ylkh vbchshkh shmv ykhsh
h gm shmsh l' r'h vl' yd' ncht lzh mzh
v v'lv chyh 'lf shnym f'mym vtvbh l' r'h--hl' 'l mqvm 'chd hkhl hvlkh
z khl 'ml h'dm lfyhv vgm hnfsh l' tml'
ch khy mh yvtr lchkhm mn hkhsyl mh l'ny yvd' lhlkh ngd hchyym
t tvb mr'h 'ynym mhlkh nfsh gm zh hbl vr'vt rvch
y mh shhyh khbr nqr' shmv vnvd' 'shr hv' 'dm vl' yvkhl ldyn 'm shhtqyf (shtqyf) mmnv
y' khy ysh dbrym hrbh mrbym hbl mh ytr l'dm
yb khy my yvd' mh tvb l'dm bchyym msfr ymy chyy hblv--vy'shm khtsl 'shr my ygyd l'dm mh yhyh 'chryv tcht hshmsh
' tvb shm mshmn tvb vyvm hmvt myvm hvldv
b tvb llkht 'l byt 'bl mlkht 'l byt mshth--b'shr hv' svf khl h'dm vhchy ytn 'l lbv
g tvb kh's mshchvq khy br' fnym yytb lb
d lb chkhmym bbyt 'bl vlb khsylym bbyt shmchh
h tvb lshm' g'rt chkhm--m'ysh shm' shyr khsylym
v khy khqvl hsyrym tcht hsyr khn shchq hkhsyl vgm zh hbl
z khy h'shq yhvll chkhm vy'bd 't lb mtnh
ch tvb 'chryt dbr mr'shytv tvb 'rkh rvch mgbh rvch
t 'l tbhl brvchkh lkh'vs khy kh's bchyq khsylym ynvch
y 'l t'mr mh hyh--shhymym hr'shnym hyv tvbym m'lh khy l' mchkhmh sh'lt 'l zh
y' tvbh chkhmh 'm nchlh vytr lr'y hshmsh
yb khy btsl hchkhmh btsl hkhsf vytrvn d't hchkhmh tchyh b'lyh
yg r'h 't m'shh h'lhym khy my yvkhl ltqn 't 'shr 'vtv
yd byvm tvbh hyh btvb vbyvm r'h r'h gm 't zh l'mt zh 'shh h'lhym 'l dbrt shl' ymts' h'dm 'chryv m'vmh
tv 't hkhl r'yty bymy hbly ysh tsdyq 'bd btsdqv vysh rsh' m'rykh br'tv
tz 'l thy tsdyq hrbh v'l ttchkhm yvtr lmh tshvmm
yz 'l trsh' hrbh v'l thy skhl lmh tmvt bl' 'tkh
ych tvb 'shr t'chz bzh vgm mzh 'l tnch 't ydkh khy yr' 'lhym yts' 't khlm
yt hchkhmh t'z lchkhm--m'shrh shlytym 'shr hyv b'yr
kh khy 'dm 'yn tsdyq b'rts--'shr y'shh tvb vl' ycht'
kh' gm lkhl hdbrym 'shr ydbrv 'l ttn lbkh 'shr l' tshm' 't 'bdkh mqllkh
khb khy gm f'mym rbvt yd' lbkh 'shr gm 't ('th) qllt 'chrym
khg khl zh nsyty bchkhmh 'mrty 'chkhmh vhy' rchvqh mmny
khd rchvq mh shhyh v'mq 'mq my ymts'nv
khh sbvty 'ny vlby ld't vltvr vbqsh chkhmh vchshbvn vld't rsh' khsl vhskhlvt hvllvt
khv vmvts' 'ny mr mmvt 't h'shh 'shr hy' mtsvdym vchrmym lbh--'svrym ydyh tvb lfny h'lhym ymlt mmnh vchvt' ylkhd bh
khz r'h zh mts'ty 'mrh qhlt 'cht l'cht lmts' chshbvn
khch 'shr 'vd bqshh nfshy vl' mts'ty 'dm 'chd m'lf mts'ty--v'shh bkhl 'lh l' mts'ty
kht lbd r'h zh mts'ty 'shr 'shh h'lhym 't h'dm yshr vhmh bqshv chshbnvt rbym
' my khhchkhm vmy yvd' fshr dbr chkhmt 'dm t'yr fnyv v'z fnyv yshn'
b 'ny fy mlkh shmr v'l dbrt shbv't 'lhym
g 'l tbhl mfnyv tlkh 'l t'md bdbr r' khy khl 'shr ychfts y'shh
d b'shr dbr mlkh shltvn vmy y'mr lv mh t'shh
h shvmr mtsvh l' yd' dbr r' v't vmshft yd' lb chkhm
v khy lkhl chfts ysh 't vmshft khy r't h'dm rbh 'lyv
z khy 'ynnv yd' mh shyhyh khy kh'shr yhyh my ygyd lv
ch 'yn 'dm shlyt brvch lkhlv' 't hrvch v'yn shltvn byvm hmvt v'yn mshlcht bmlchmh vl' ymlt rsh' 't b'lyv
t 't khl zh r'yty vntvn 't lby lkhl m'shh 'shr n'shh tcht hshmsh 't 'shr shlt h'dm b'dm--lr' lv
y vbkhn r'yty rsh'ym qbrym vb'v vmmqvm qdvsh yhlkhv vyshtkhchv b'yr 'shr khn 'shv gm zh hbl
y' 'shr 'yn n'shh ftgm m'shh hr'h mhrh 'l khn ml' lb bny h'dm bhm--l'shvt r'
yb 'shr cht' 'shh r' m't--vm'rykh lv khy gm yvd' 'ny 'shr yhyh tvb lyr'y h'lhym 'shr yyr'v mlfnyv
yg vtvb l' yhyh lrsh' vl' y'rykh ymym khtsl--'shr 'ynnv yr' mlfny 'lhym
yd ysh hbl 'shr n'shh 'l h'rts 'shr ysh tsdyqym 'shr mgy' 'lhm khm'shh hrsh'ym vysh rsh'ym shmgy' 'lhm khm'shh htsdyqym 'mrty shgm zh hbl
tv vshbchty 'ny 't hshmchh 'shr 'yn tvb l'dm tcht hshmsh khy 'm l'khl vlshtvt vlshmvch vhv' ylvnv b'mlv ymy chyyv 'shr ntn lv h'lhym--tcht hshmsh
tz kh'shr ntty 't lby ld't chkhmh vlr'vt 't h'nyn 'shr n'shh 'l h'rts khy gm byvm vblylh--shnh b'ynyv 'ynnv r'h
yz vr'yty 't khl m'shh h'lhym khy l' yvkhl h'dm lmtsv' 't hm'shh 'shr n'shh tcht hshmsh bshl 'shr y'ml h'dm lbqsh vl' ymts' vgm 'm y'mr hchkhm ld't l' yvkhl lmts'
' khy 't khl zh ntty 'l lby vlbvr 't khl zh 'shr htsdyqym vhchkhmym v'bdyhm byd h'lhym gm 'hbh gm shn'h 'yn yvd' h'dm--hkhl lfnyhm
b hkhl kh'shr lkhl mqrh 'chd ltsdyq vlrsh' ltvb vlthvr vltm' vlzbch vl'shr 'ynnv zbch khtvb khcht'--hnshb' kh'shr shbv'h yr'
g zh r' bkhl 'shr n'shh tcht hshmsh--khy mqrh 'chd lkhl vgm lb bny h'dm ml' r' vhvllvt blbbm bchyyhm v'chryv 'l hmtym
d khy my 'shr ybchr (ychbr) 'l khl hchyym ysh btchvn khy lkhlb chy hv' tvb mn h'ryh hmt
h khy hchyym yvd'ym shymtv vhmtym 'ynm yvd'ym m'vmh v'yn 'vd lhm shkhr--khy nshkhch zkhrm
v gm 'hbtm gm shn'tm gm qn'tm khbr 'bdh vchlq 'yn lhm 'vd l'vlm bkhl 'shr n'shh tcht hshmsh
z lkh 'khl bshmchh lchmkh vshth blb tvb yynkh khy khbr rtsh h'lhym 't m'shykh
ch bkhl 't yhyv bgdykh lbnym vshmn 'l r'shkh 'l ychsr
t r'h chyym 'm 'shh 'shr 'hbt khl ymy chyy hblkh 'shr ntn lkh tcht hshmsh khl ymy hblkh khy hv' chlqkh bchyym vb'mlkh 'shr 'th 'ml tcht hshmsh
y khl 'shr tmts' ydkh l'shvt bkhchkh--'shh khy 'yn m'shh vchshbvn vd't vchkhmh bsh'vl 'shr 'th hlkh shmh {s}
y' shbty vr'h tcht hshmsh khy l' lqlym hmrvts vl' lgbvrym hmlchmh vgm l' lchkhmym lchm vgm l' lnbnym 'shr vgm l' lyd'ym chn khy 't vfg' yqrh 't khlm
yb khy gm l' yd' h'dm 't 'tv khdgym shn'chzym bmtsvdh r'h vkhtsfrym h'chzvt bfch khhm yvqshym bny h'dm l't r'h khshtfvl 'lyhm ft'm
yg gm zh r'yty chkhmh tcht hshmsh vgdvlh hy' 'ly
yd 'yr qtnh v'nshym bh m't vb' 'lyh mlkh gdvl vsbb 'th vbnh 'lyh mtsvdym gdlym
tv vmts' bh 'ysh mskhn chkhm vmlt hv' 't h'yr bchkhmtv v'dm l' zkhr 't h'ysh hmskhn hhv'
tz v'mrty 'ny tvbh chkhmh mgbvrh vchkhmt hmskhn bzvyh vdbryv 'ynm nshm'ym
yz dbry chkhmym bncht nshm'ym--mz'qt mvshl bkhsylym
ych tvbh chkhmh mkhly qrb vchvt' 'chd y'bd tvbh hrbh
' zbvby mvt yb'ysh yby' shmn rvqch yqr mchkhmh mkhbvd skhlvt m't
b lb chkhm lymynv vlb khsyl lshm'lv
g vgm bdrkh khshhskhl (khshskhl) hlkh lbv chsr v'mr lkhl skhl hv'
d 'm rvch hmvshl t'lh 'lykh mqvmkh 'l tnch khy mrf' ynych cht'ym gdvlym
h ysh r'h r'yty tcht hshmsh--khshggh shyts' mlfny hshlyt
v ntn hskhl bmrvmym rbym v'shyrym bshfl yshbv
z r'yty 'bdym 'l svsym vshrym hlkhym kh'bdym 'l h'rts
ch chfr gvmts bv yfvl vfrts gdr yshkhnv nchsh
t msy' 'bnym y'tsb bhm bvq' 'tsym yskhn bm
y 'm qhh hbrzl vhv' l' fnym qlql vchylym ygbr vytrvn hkhshyr chkhmh
y' 'm yshkh hnchsh blv' lchsh v'yn ytrvn lb'l hlshvn
yb dbry fy chkhm chn vshftvt khsyl tbl'nv
yg tchlt dbry fyhv skhlvt v'chryt fyhv hvllvt r'h
yd vhskhl yrbh dbrym l' yd' h'dm mh shyhyh v'shr yhyh m'chryv my ygyd lv
tv 'ml hkhsylym tyg'nv--'shr l' yd' llkht 'l 'yr
